title: Algerian Lamb Tagine with a German Twist
description: A hearty and exotic German-inspired tagine made with tender lamb and aromatic spices.
instructions: Brown the lamb in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add piquant spice blend and algerian spice mix, and cook for 1 minute.
Transfer the lamb to a slow cooker or tagine.
Add 1 cup of water, cover, and cook on low for 8 hours.
Add chopped walnuts and stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot with crusty bread or over egg noodles.
Allow 30 minutes to rest before slicing the lamb.
Serve sliced lamb with the flavorful sauce spooned over the top.
